name: assess_pass
description: One focused pass of the deep pentest: explore (deeper, focus-directed, docs-aware) -> hypothesize (docs-invariant + race + chaining aware, deduped against already-tried) -> exploit fan-out -> adversarial verify. Returns new confirmed/rejected/blind findings + the hypothesis signatures attempted this pass, for the multi-pass loop in deep_assess. LLM prompts injected by register.sh.

inputParameters.queryExpression: { app_model: .app_model, exploration: (.observations // []), available_identities: ((.identities // {}) | keys), personas: (.personas // []), catalog_objectives: (.catalog_objectives // []), cve_leads: (.cve_leads // []), mandatory_hypotheses: (.mandatory_hypotheses // []), chaining_context: (.chaining_context // {}), objective_focus: (.objective_focus // []), object_id_patterns: (.app_model.object_id_patterns // []), docs_digest: (.docs_digest // {}), tried_signatures: (.tried // []), focus_directive: (.focus // "") } | tojson

messages.message:
Application model + exploration + identities + docs digest + focus (JSON):
${prep_hypo.output.result}

inputParameters.queryExpression: .raw as $r | (if ($r|type) == "object" then $r else (try ($r[ ($r|index("{")) : (($r|rindex("}"))+1) ] | fromjson) catch {hypotheses: []}) end)

. as $in | { hypotheses: [ ($in.hypotheses // [])[] | . as $h | (($h.category // "other") + "|" + (($h.target // "") | ascii_downcase | gsub("\\s+";"")) + "|" + (($h.identities // []) | sort | join(","))) as $sig | select(($h.mandatory // false) == true or (($in.tried // []) | index($sig) | not)) ] }

. as $in | def dwf($h): (if ((($h.category // "") + " " + ($h.objective_id // "") + " " + ($h.mandatory_kind // "") + " " + ($h.title // "") + " " + ($h.target // "")) | test("inject|rce|sqli|sql injection|javascript|scriptengine|eval|sandbox|deserial|ssti|expression|supply-chain|cve|xss|cross-site|traversal|\\blfi\\b|open-redirect|feature.sweep";"i")) then "exploit_deepen" else "exploit_agent" end); ([ ($in.hypotheses // [])[] | select((.blind // false) == false) ] | sort_by(.mandatory != true)) as $f | ($f | .[0:([($in.max_hypos), ([ $f[] | select(.mandatory == true) ] | length)] | max)] | to_entries) as $entries | { forkTasks: ($entries | map({ name: dwf(.value), taskReferenceName: ("exploit_" + (.key|tostring)), type: "SUB_WORKFLOW", optional: true, subWorkflowParam: {name: dwf(.value), version:1} })), forkTasksInputs: ($entries | map({ key: ("exploit_" + (.key|tostring)), value: { base_url: $in.base_url, scope: $in.scope, identities: $in.identities, app_model: $in.app_model, hypothesis: .value, max_steps: (if (dwf(.value)=="exploit_deepen") then ([($in.max_steps), 30] | max) else $in.max_steps end), docs_namespace: $in.docs_namespace, docs_index: $in.docs_index, docs_available: $in.docs_available, oob_base: $in.oob_base, run_id: $in.run_id, manifest: $in.manifest, capability_max: $in.capability_max, personas: $in.personas, llm_provider: $in.loop_provider, model: $in.loop_model, embed_provider: $in.embed_provider, embed_model: $in.embed_model, feature_operations: $in.feature_operations } }) | from_entries), count: ($entries | length) }

[ (.join // {}) | to_entries[] | .value | select(.conclusion.confirmed == true) | { title: (.conclusion.title // .hypothesis.title), objective_id: (.hypothesis.objective_id // "other"), severity: (.conclusion.severity // "Info"), category: (.conclusion.category // .hypothesis.category // "other"), cwe: (.conclusion.cwe // ""), owasp: (.conclusion.owasp // .hypothesis.owasp // ""), evidence: (.conclusion.evidence // ""), reproduction: (.conclusion.reproduction // ""), poc_request: (.conclusion.poc_request // {}), hypothesis_id: (.hypothesis.id // ""), evidence_chain: (.evidence // []), oob_tokens: (.oob_tokens // []) } ]

[ (.join // {}) | to_entries[] | .value | ((.conclusion.created_resources // []) + (.created // []))[] | select(.url and (.url|type=="string")) | { method: (.method // "DELETE"), url: .url, identity: (.identity // "") } ]

([ (.join // {}) | to_entries[] | .value.hypothesis | select((.objective_id // "") != "") | {type:"objective_attempt", objective_id:.objective_id, hypothesis_id:(.id // ""), note:"exploit agent completed"} ] + [ (.join // {}) | to_entries[] | .value as $v | ($v.operations // [])[] | . + {objective_id: ($v.hypothesis.objective_id // "other"), hypothesis_id: ($v.hypothesis.id // "")} ]) | unique_by((.type // "") + "|" + (.method // "") + "|" + (.path // "") + "|" + (.workflow_name // "") + "|" + (.execution_id // "") + "|" + (.identity // "") + "|" + ((.status // "") | tostring) + "|" + (.objective_id // "") + "|" + (.hypothesis_id // "") + "|" + (.cve_id // "") + "|" + (.family // ""))

[ (.join // {}) | to_entries[] | .value | select((.deepen_state // {}) | (.ladder // []) | length > 0) | { objective_id: (.hypothesis.objective_id // "other"), sink_class: (.deepen_state.sink_class // ""), cve_id: (.deepen_state.cve_id // .hypothesis.cve_id // ""), dependency: (.deepen_state.dependency // .hypothesis.dependency // ""), ledger: (.deepen_state.ledger // {}), confirmed: (.deepen_state.confirmed // false) } ]
[ (.join // {}) | to_entries[] | .value | (.halt_requested // "") | select(. != "" and . != null) ] | (if length > 0 then {reason: .[0]} else {} end)

(.join // {}) | ([ to_entries[] | .value | select(((.oob_tokens // []) | length) > 0) | { hypothesis: (.hypothesis // {}), tokens: (.oob_tokens // []), evidence_chain: (.evidence // []) } ]) as $agents | { agents: $agents, tokens: ([ $agents[].tokens[] ] | unique) }

.sweep as $s | (($s.per_token) // {}) as $pt | [ (.agents // [])[] | select( ([ .tokens[] | ($pt[.] // 0) ] | add) > 0 ) | { title: ("SSRF: target server fetched an attacker-controlled URL via " + (.hypothesis.target // .hypothesis.title // "an outbound-fetch feature")), objective_id: "INFRA-SSRF", severity: "High", category: "ssrf", cwe: "CWE-918", owasp: "A10:2021 - Server-Side Request Forgery", evidence: ("Out-of-band confirmation: planted canary(es) [" + (.tokens | join(", ")) + "] received an inbound request FROM THE TARGET SERVER (not the tester). Source IP(s): " + (($s.source_ips // []) | join(", ")) + "; User-Agent(s): " + (($s.user_agents // []) | join(", ")) + ". A request originating from the target to a tester-controlled URL confirms server-side request forgery."), reproduction: (.hypothesis.test_plan // []), poc_request: {}, confidence: "high", source_tool: "oob_confirmed", oob_tokens: .tokens, evidence_chain: .evidence_chain } ]

. as $in | ($in.findings // []) | to_entries | { forkTasks: map({ name: "verify_finding", taskReferenceName: ("verify_" + (.key|tostring)), type: "SUB_WORKFLOW", optional: true, subWorkflowParam: {name:"verify_finding", version:1} }), forkTasksInputs: (map({ key: ("verify_" + (.key|tostring)), value: { finding: .value, identities: $in.identities, scope: $in.scope, llm_provider: $in.analysis_provider, model: $in.analysis_model } }) | from_entries), count: length }

[ (.join // {}) | to_entries[] | .value | { finding: .finding, verdict: .verdict } ] | { confirmed: [ .[] | select(.verdict.real == true) | (.finding + { severity: (.verdict.severity // .finding.severity), confidence: (.verdict.confidence // "medium"), validation: (.verdict.reasoning // ""), source_tool: "deep_exploit" }) ], rejected: [ .[] | select(.verdict.real != true) | { title: .finding.title, reason: (.verdict.false_positive_reason // .verdict.reasoning // "") } ] }

. as $in | (($in.purple == true) or ($in.purple == "true")) as $on | (if $on then ($in.findings // []) else [] end) | to_entries | { forkTasks: map({ name: "purple_check", taskReferenceName: ("purple_" + (.key|tostring)), type: "SUB_WORKFLOW", optional: true, subWorkflowParam: {name:"purple_check", version:1} }), forkTasksInputs: (map({ key: ("purple_" + (.key|tostring)), value: { finding: .value, identities: $in.identities, scope: $in.scope, manifest: $in.manifest, capability_max: $in.capability_max, llm_provider: $in.analysis_provider, model: $in.analysis_model } }) | from_entries), count: length }

([ ((.purple_join // {}) | to_entries[] | .value) | select(.title) | {key: .title, value: .detection_observations} ] | from_entries) as $p | [ (.findings // [])[] | . + (if ($p[.title]) then {detection_observations: $p[.title]} else {} end) ]
[ (.hypotheses // [])[] | select(.blind == true) | { title, category, owasp, target, rationale, test_plan, expected_evidence } ]
